body:
Implementation plan complete for BIN-104 (Beta Feedback Digest). Plan added to issue description.

**Summary of approach:**
- New `feedback` sidebar tab on story page (alongside notes/revision/collab)
- New `ReaderComment` type + `story-{storyId}-reader-comments` localStorage storage
- 5-theme keyword-set clustering in `src/lib/feedbackDigest.ts` (clarity, pacing, character, confusion, emotional-impact)
- 3 new components: `FeedbackDigestPanel` (shell with chapter selector, digest/raw sub-tabs), `ClusterCard` (expandable with source comments + trust controls), `AddReaderCommentModal`
- Revision task creation adds to a `beta-feedback` pass in the existing RevisionPass system
- Export via browser Blob download (.txt format)
- All confidence recalculation is reactive via `useMemo` on `comments` state

**Files touched:** 8 new files, 4 modified

Assign to: Code Monkey

Blocked: cannot reassign — Design agent lacks `tasks:assign` permission. Board requested handoff to Founding Engineer. CEO needs to reassign [BIN-104](/BIN/issues/BIN-104) to Founding Engineer (`8b73f0f6-2e62-4dcc-9ece-91b3a1df902b`). Design spec is complete and ready.

## Handoff to Founding Engineer

Design spec for [BIN-104](/BIN/issues/BIN-104) is complete (see full spec in comments above). The board has requested this be assigned to Founding Engineer for implementation planning.

I do not have `tasks:assign` permission to reassign directly. Escalating to CEO to complete the handoff to Founding Engineer (`8b73f0f6-2e62-4dcc-9ece-91b3a1df902b`).

Design spec complete. Covers: digest view with 5 predefined theme cluster cards (clarity/pacing/character/confusion/emotional impact), confidence indicators, source comment drill-down, reader trust controls (exclude by comment or anonymity), 2-click revision task creation, export to txt/md, digest update behavior, keyword-set clustering logic for engineering, and open questions.

## Design Spec: Beta Feedback Digest

### Overview
The Feedback Digest turns a chapter's raw reader comments into a structured view that clusters them by theme and provides confidence indicators, so writers can prioritize revision decisions in under 2 clicks from a cluster to a revision task. Transparency of clustering logic and drill-down access to source comments are first-class requirements.

---

### 1. Entry Point

**Access:** Feedback tab in chapter sidebar/detail view (visible when the chapter has at least 1 reader comment).
**Sub-tab:** Digest | Raw (Raw shows the existing unfiltered comment list; Digest is the new view)

---

### 2. Digest View Layout

#### Header
- Chapter name
- [N] comments in digest | [N] excluded | Last updated [timestamp]
- Export button (exports digest summary as plain text or markdown file)

#### Theme Cluster Cards (one per active theme)
Themes (predefined 5): **Clarity** | **Pacing** | **Character** | **Confusion** | **Emotional Impact**

Each cluster card shows:
- Theme label + icon
- Confidence badge: High (4+ matching comments) | Medium (2-3) | Low (1)
- Signal summary: e.g., 5 readers flagged pacing issues
- Top excerpt: most-representative comment snippet (first 120 chars)
- Expand: shows all source comments in this cluster (inline, not modal)
- Actions: Create revision task | Exclude all in cluster

**Sorting:** Cards sorted by confidence (High first), then by comment count descending.

**Unthemed comments:**
- Separate section at bottom: Unclustered (N comments)
- Shows comments that did not match any theme keyword set
- Writer can manually drag to a theme or exclude

---

### 3. Source Comment Drill-Down

**Expanding a cluster card:**
- Lists each comment with: reader identifier (anonymous or name if provided), comment text, date
- Per-comment actions: Exclude from digest | Pin to top of cluster
- Excluded comments are dimmed and moved to a collapsible Excluded section within the card
- Confidence badge recalculates when a comment is excluded

---

### 4. Reader Trust Controls

**Per-cluster controls:**
- Exclude all anonymous comments from this cluster (toggle)
- Exclude low-signal inputs: comments under 10 words (toggle, default off)

**Per-comment controls:**
- Exclude this comment: removes from weighting and hides from cluster (undo available)
- Excluded comment list is accessible at bottom of each cluster (show X excluded)

**Global (cluster header):**
- Show excluded comments toggle (collapses/expands all excluded rows across all clusters)

---

### 5. Convert Cluster to Revision Task

**From cluster card (primary CTA):**
- Create revision task button
- Opens pre-filled revision task form:
  - Title: pre-populated: Review [Theme] in [Chapter Name]
  - Description: pre-populated with signal summary + top 2 comment excerpts
- One click to confirm and create; task lands in Revision Queue
- After creation: cluster card shows a Created revision task badge (with link to the task)

**From single comment (secondary):**
- Create task from this comment in per-comment action row
- Pre-fills description with just that comment

---

### 6. Digest Export

**Export formats:** Plain text (.txt) | Markdown (.md)
**Contents:** Chapter name, date range, per-theme summary, comment count, confidence level, top excerpts, excluded count
**Delivery:** Browser download; filename: [StoryTitle]-[ChapterName]-feedback-digest-[date].txt

---

### 7. Digest Update Behavior

**Real-time:** Digest recalculates when:
- New comments arrive (polling or websocket, whichever is available)
- Writer excludes/restores a comment

**Staleness indicator:** If digest was last computed > 1 hour ago and new comments exist: banner: New comments available. Refresh digest.

---

### 8. Empty States

- No comments yet: Share your chapter preview to collect reader comments. They will appear here once submitted.
- Comments exist but none match any theme: Reader comments are here but none matched a theme pattern. Review them in the Raw tab.
- All clusters have only excluded comments: All comments in this chapter have been excluded from the digest.

---

### 9. Clustering Logic (Design Intent for Engineering)

MVP approach: keyword-set matching per theme (no ML):
- Clarity: words like confused, unclear, did not understand, lost track, hard to follow
- Pacing: words like slow, dragging, rushed, too fast, jumped, skipped
- Character: words like character, motivation, felt off, inconsistent, did not believe
- Confusion: words like what happened, did not make sense, timeline, who was, which one
- Emotional Impact: words like moved, cried, felt, emotional, powerful, fell flat, detached

A comment can match multiple themes. Confidence = count of comments with at least 1 keyword hit for that theme.

---

### 10. Accessibility and Performance
- All cluster cards keyboard navigable; expand/collapse with Enter
- Confidence badges have ARIA labels (not color-only)
- Exclude/restore actions have undo toasts (5-second window)
- Digest computes server-side; client receives pre-clustered JSON

---

### 11. Open Questions for Engineering
1. Keyword matching: server-side at comment ingestion, or computed on-demand per digest request?
2. Does Revision Queue have a task creation API that accepts pre-filled title/description?
3. Export: server-generated file or client-side string download?
4. Unclustered comments: manual re-classification stored or ephemeral per session?

---

### Handoff
Design complete. Ready for engineering.

- Source issue: [BIN-104](/BIN/issues/BIN-104)
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-102.
